model_narrative: A set of items, each with a given size, must be packed into bins that all share one common capacity. The model decides which bin each item is placed in and which bins are opened, aiming to use as few bins as possible.

params.name: B
params.doc: bin capacity (every bin shares the same capacity)

vars.name: y
vars.doc: 1 if item i is placed in bin j, else 0

vars.name: z
vars.doc: 1 if bin j is open (used), else 0

vars.name: open_bins
vars.doc: number of open bins (the quantity being minimized)

description: For each bin, the combined size of the items placed in that bin cannot exceed the bin's capacity when the bin is open, and if the bin is not open then no items may be placed in it.

model_narrative: A set of items, each with a given size, must be packed into bins that all share one common capacity. The model decides which bin each item is placed in and which bins are opened, aiming to use as few bins as possible.

params.name: B
params.doc: bin capacity (every bin shares the same capacity)

vars.name: y
vars.doc: 1 if item i is placed in bin j, else 0

vars.name: z
vars.doc: 1 if bin j is open (used), else 0

vars.name: open_bins
vars.doc: number of open bins (the quantity being minimized)

description: Each item must be placed in exactly one bin.

model_narrative: A set of items, each with a given size, must be packed into bins that all share one common capacity. The model decides which bin each item is placed in and which bins are opened, aiming to use as few bins as possible.

params.name: B
params.doc: bin capacity (every bin shares the same capacity)

vars.name: y
vars.doc: 1 if item i is placed in bin j, else 0

vars.name: z
vars.doc: 1 if bin j is open (used), else 0

vars.name: open_bins
vars.doc: number of open bins (the quantity being minimized)

description: Define the number of open bins as the total count of bins that are open.
expected_pyomo: model.defobj = Constraint(expr=model.open_bins == sum(model.z[j] for j in model.J))

model_narrative: A set of items, each with a given size, must be packed into bins that all share one common capacity. The model decides which bin each item is placed in and which bins are opened, aiming to use as few bins as possible.

params.name: B
params.doc: bin capacity (every bin shares the same capacity)

vars.name: y
vars.doc: 1 if item i is placed in bin j, else 0

vars.name: z
vars.doc: 1 if bin j is open (used), else 0

vars.name: open_bins
vars.doc: number of open bins (the quantity being minimized)

description: Generate the complete constraint set for this model.
expected_pyomo:
def defopen_rule(model, j):
    return sum(model.s[i] * model.y[i,j] for i in model.I) <= model.B * model.z[j]
model.defopen = Constraint(model.J, rule=defopen_rule)

def defone_rule(model, i):
    return sum(model.y[i,j] for j in model.J) == 1.0
model.defone = Constraint(model.I, rule=defone_rule)

model.defobj = Constraint(expr=model.open_bins == sum(model.z[j] for j in model.J))
